saints.name: Saint John the Merciful, Patriarch of Alexandria

troparion.text: By endurance you gained your reward, venerable Father; / you persevered in prayer unceasingly; / you loved the poor and provided for them in all things. / Blessed John the Merciful, intercede with Christ God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: You distributed your wealth to the poor / and in return obtained wealth from heaven, John the Merciful. / Therefore, we honor you and celebrate your memory, O namesake of mercy.

saints.name: Venerable Neilos the Ascetic of Sinai

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, /  and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / Our Father Neilos, pray to Christ God to save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “O Victorious Leader...”)
O blessed Neilos, like firewood, you cut away the branches of corporeal passions by your prayerful vigil;  / and as one having boldness before the Lord, deliver me from every possible danger that I may cry to you:  / “Hail, O Father revered by all the world.”

saints.name: Blessed John “the Hairy” and Fool-For-Christ at Rostov

troparion.text: In your patience, you possessed your reward, O holy father. / You were constant in prayer, while loving and aiding the poor. / Beseech Christ God, O John the merciful, that He may save our souls!

kontakion.text: By distributing your wealth to the poor, O John most wise, / you gained the wealth of heaven and were called the merciful one: / Therefore we honor you and celebrate your holy memory!

troparion.text: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophet Ahijah, O Lord; / through him we entreat You, / save our souls.

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)Enlightened by the Spirit, your pure heart became the dwelling place of most splendid prophecy; / for you saw things far off as if they were near.  / Therefore, we honor you, blessed and glorious Prophet Ahijah.

saints.name: Venerable Nilus the Myrrhgusher of Mount Athos

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Nilus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
